title: Open Studios at Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Walk through working artist studios, meet creatives, explore installations. Low-pressure cultural date with wine and good energy.

title: Atlanta Contemporary Open Studios
location: Atlanta Contemporary Art Center, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Tour working artist studios, meet the creatives behind the art, explore cutting-edge installations. Intimate and free — perfect for couples who love culture.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 1
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's iconic spring festival at its new park home. Headliners: Umphrey's McGee + Thievery Corporation. Craft brews, skyline views, outdoor dancing. Great for couples who love outdoor festivals.

title: BLUME... The Spring Rooftop Affair
location: Grand Hyatt Atlanta Rooftop Terrace, 3300 Peachtree Rd NE, Buckhead
description: Upscale rooftop soirée with premium cocktails, classy crowd, and refined vibes. Spring attire encouraged. Perfect for couples who want an elegant date with skyline views and great energy.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Day 2 with lespecial, The Moss, Sneezy and more. Outdoor dancing, food vendors, relaxed spring atmosphere. Great date under the open sky with live music and food.

title: Helium Presents: John Caparulo
location: Helium Comedy Club, 4930 Old National Hwy #4, College Park, GA 30337
description: Sharp-witted stand-up from the 'Mad Max' comedian. Helium has great drinks and appetizers. Low-key, funny date night with good food and laughs.

title: "15 MINUTES" Opening Reception at Gallery Anderson Smith
location: 1401 Peachtree St NE, Ste. A200, Atlanta, GA 30309
description: Contemporary art exhibit opening with wine and light bites. Submission-based show with rotating themes. Sophisticated, Instagram-worthy art date.

title: Mimosa Fest Live! at The Battery
location: Live! at The Battery, 260 Peachtree Rd NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Day party with live DJ, mimosa samplings, outdoor games, and local vendors. Perfect for couples who want a fun, lively daytime date with day-drinking vibes and good music.

title: In The Other Room: Dirty South Comedy at Helium
location: Helium Comedy Club, 4930 Old National Hwy #4, College Park, GA
description: Atlanta's filthiest comedians hit the stage for a no-holds-barred show. Great drinks, loud laughs, no-filter humor. For couples who don't mind getting a little dirty.

title: Pours & Punchlines | Stand-Up Comedy Showcase
description: Comedy show + drinks at the Beltline's favorite taproom. Local comics, solid craft beers. Casual, fun, low-key date vibe.

title: Fantastic Cat with Duuuuse
description: Indie rock quartet known for hooky songs and theatrical live shows. Great pick for couples into discovery-type music dates.

title: King Tuff
description: Psychedelic rock and roll from Kyle Thomas. Catchy, colorful, fun live show. Affordable and energetic date night for music lovers.

title: Roaring 20s Latin Night @ Brimstone Tavern
description: Salsa ATL brings Latin dancing energy to Alpharetta. Roaring 20s theme adds flair. Dancing, good music, great date night for couples who want to move.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Amapiano, Afrobeats & More
description: Atlanta's hottest Afrobeat/Amapiano party. Dancing, vibes, good crowd. Perfect for couples who love to dance and enjoy global Black music.

title: Atlanta Contemporary - Sunday Studio Sessions
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Free afternoon at Atlanta Contemporary with optional art-making activities. Great for couples who want a chill cultural afternoon without breaking the bank.
